LAW AND MOTION 301, ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM APR-21-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-29-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. DEFENDANT KENNETH LARREW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. DESPITE TENTATIVE RULINGS REQUESTING COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PAPERS ON BOTH APRIL 15, 2004 AND APRIL 16, 2004, THE PARTIES STILL HAVE NOT SUPPLIED PAPERS TO THE COURT. THE PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES TO DEPT. 301 BY NOON ON 04/26/04 WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR #3058

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KENNETH LARREW'S DEMURRER COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. 5 DAYS LEAVE FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER, TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2004 Advanced From Apr-26-04 To Apr-15-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Continued To Apr-29-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT KENNETH LARREW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: CONTINUED to 04/29/04 on the Court's own motion. Despite tentative rulings requesting courtesy copies of the moving and opposing papers on both April 15, 2004 and April 16, 2004, the parties still have not supplied papers to the Court. The parties are instructed to deliver courtesy copies to Dept. 301 by noon on 04/26/04 with a cover letter referencing the continued hearing date. (301/AJR/EH) Reporter: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR #3058

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Both parties are to submit courtesy copies together with a cover letter referencing the new hearing date as soon as possible. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
